author: y4rr
content: Probe plan: (a) compare per-stage tensors on image 4 between rust dump and a torchvision hook-extracted dump — RPN proposals, post-box-head boxes/scores, post-NMS scores, keypoint heatmaps, decoded keypoints. (b) Known suspect: keypoint_roi_pool uses featmap_names=['0','1','2','3'] (p2..p5) — 4 levels — but rust assign_fpn_levels_keypoint clamps to [2,6] and iterates over 5 levels (p2..p6). Any ROI assigned level=6 in rust would diverge from torchvision (which clamps to level=5).
